records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't have to worry about Laika, Coach. I'll be with her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't have to worry about Laika, Coach. I'll be with her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't have to worry about Laika, Coach. I'll be with her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. Then I'll leave her to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. Then I'll leave her to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. Then I'll leave her to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Old Voice, do you hear me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Old Voice, do you hear me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Old Voice, do you hear me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Loud and clear, Elizabeth. Have you finished the investigation I asked about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Loud and clear, Elizabeth. Have you finished the investigation I asked about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Loud and clear, Elizabeth. Have you finished the investigation I asked about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You proclaimed your identity with such pride, as if something were to change in the aftermath of the game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You proclaimed your identity with such pride, as if something were to change in the aftermath of the game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You proclaimed your identity with such pride, as if something were to change in the aftermath of the game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you're still merely requesting favours from behind the veil, Old Voice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you're still merely requesting favours from behind the veil, Old Voice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you're still merely requesting favours from behind the veil, Old Voice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha. I am all out of excuses. However, you are the expert when it comes to analyzing and examining Artifacts, are you not?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha. I am all out of excuses. However, you are the expert when it comes to analyzing and examining Artifacts, are you not?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha. I am all out of excuses. However, you are the expert when it comes to analyzing and examining Artifacts, are you not?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are leagues ahead in that field than the Administration, after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are leagues ahead in that field than the Administration, after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are leagues ahead in that field than the Administration, after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. It appears that your silver tongue remains intact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. It appears that your silver tongue remains intact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. It appears that your silver tongue remains intact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nevertheless, the truth is that you utilize our services as if we were your cost-effective detective agency.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nevertheless, the truth is that you utilize our services as if we were your cost-effective detective agency.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nevertheless, the truth is that you utilize our services as if we were your cost-effective detective agency.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It has been a while since our last encounter amidst the Qliphoth Game, Old Voice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It has been a while since our last encounter amidst the Qliphoth Game, Old Voice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It has been a while since our last encounter amidst the Qliphoth Game, Old Voice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. I believe this is our first time meeting in person, Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. I believe this is our first time meeting in person, Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. I believe this is our first time meeting in person, Supreme Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, my... The chief of Prydwen has come to Charade herself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, my... The chief of Prydwen has come to Charade herself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, my... The chief of Prydwen has come to Charade herself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I expected you to be an unpleasant old man. I still cannot believe this is your real face.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I expected you to be an unpleasant old man. I still cannot believe this is your real face.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I expected you to be an unpleasant old man. I still cannot believe this is your real face.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha, I do look pretty young.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha, I do look pretty young.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha, I do look pretty young.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, I doubt we have time for small talk.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, I doubt we have time for small talk.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, I doubt we have time for small talk.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. I always make time for tea, regardless of how busy I am.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. I always make time for tea, regardless of how busy I am.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. I always make time for tea, regardless of how busy I am.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This new black tea is delicious. Join me for a cup of tea while you tell me the story of your poor kitten.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This new black tea is delicious. Join me for a cup of tea while you tell me the story of your poor kitten.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This new black tea is delicious. Join me for a cup of tea while you tell me the story of your poor kitten.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...This is all the intel related to Cold Case No. 88.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...This is all the intel related to Cold Case No. 88.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...This is all the intel related to Cold Case No. 88.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. I knew I could count on you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. I knew I could count on you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. I knew I could count on you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't try to wheedle your way out of this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't try to wheedle your way out of this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't try to wheedle your way out of this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This was strictly business.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This was strictly business.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This was strictly business.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since we have given you the information you required, now it's your turn.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since we have given you the information you required, now it's your turn.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since we have given you the information you required, now it's your turn.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a long-time partner of the Institution, please hold up your end, Old Voice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a long-time partner of the Institution, please hold up your end, Old Voice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a long-time partner of the Institution, please hold up your end, Old Voice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha. The new chief appears to be coming on strong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha. The new chief appears to be coming on strong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha. The new chief appears to be coming on strong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. What questions do the second-to-none intelligence gathering people want to ask me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. What questions do the second-to-none intelligence gathering people want to ask me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. What questions do the second-to-none intelligence gathering people want to ask me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am sure you are aware of the recent purge at the Society.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am sure you are aware of the recent purge at the Society.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am sure you are aware of the recent purge at the Society.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is my assumption that Regina MacCready becoming the President was all arranged by you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is my assumption that Regina MacCready becoming the President was all arranged by you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is my assumption that Regina MacCready becoming the President was all arranged by you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that right, Old Voice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that right, Old Voice?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that right, Old Voice?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, I have no idea what you're talking about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, I have no idea what you're talking about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, I have no idea what you're talking about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Regina became the new President, wouldn't it have been because she possessed the necessary talent?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Regina became the new President, wouldn't it have been because she possessed the necessary talent?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Regina became the new President, wouldn't it have been because she possessed the necessary talent?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, someone could have noticed her potential and nudged her in that direction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, someone could have noticed her potential and nudged her in that direction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, someone could have noticed her potential and nudged her in that direction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For instance, a blue bird from a fairy tale.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For instance, a blue bird from a fairy tale.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For instance, a blue bird from a fairy tale.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A blue bird...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A blue bird...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A blue bird...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that I think of it... Water Flea said he saw a crow at the scene...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that I think of it... Water Flea said he saw a crow at the scene...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that I think of it... Water Flea said he saw a crow at the scene...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Water Flea? Ha ha, what a cute nickname. Who came up with it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Water Flea? Ha ha, what a cute nickname. Who came up with it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Water Flea? Ha ha, what a cute nickname. Who came up with it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem! Please stay on topic!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem! Please stay on topic!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem! Please stay on topic!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, as a result of that incident, the Institution was able to capture the Dean of Archeology.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, as a result of that incident, the Institution was able to capture the Dean of Archeology.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, as a result of that incident, the Institution was able to capture the Dean of Archeology.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But before he was transferred to the Royal Correctional Service, he said this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But before he was transferred to the Royal Correctional Service, he said this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But before he was transferred to the Royal Correctional Service, he said this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Burnett and I were long friends.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Burnett and I were long friends.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Burnett and I were long friends.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He would always solve my puzzles in his own way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He would always solve my puzzles in his own way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He would always solve my puzzles in his own way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... when we fought over the Fragment found in Holy Curia...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... when we fought over the Fragment found in Holy Curia...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... when we fought over the Fragment found in Holy Curia...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We were both gravely injured from a long and tiring fight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We were both gravely injured from a long and tiring fight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We were both gravely injured from a long and tiring fight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, it wasn't until later that we realized that the Fragment was nowhere to be found.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, it wasn't until later that we realized that the Fragment was nowhere to be found.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, it wasn't until later that we realized that the Fragment was nowhere to be found.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was only recent that I came to hear the whereabouts of the Fragment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was only recent that I came to hear the whereabouts of the Fragment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was only recent that I came to hear the whereabouts of the Fragment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As we speak, the remnants of the Society are gathering all the Fragments they can find.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As we speak, the remnants of the Society are gathering all the Fragments they can find.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As we speak, the remnants of the Society are gathering all the Fragments they can find.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's as if they're possessed... and we must not overlook this as a coincidence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's as if they're possessed... and we must not overlook this as a coincidence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's as if they're possessed... and we must not overlook this as a coincidence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Institution's investigation into the Holy Curia's Fragment has been somewhat insignificant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Institution's investigation into the Holy Curia's Fragment has been somewhat insignificant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Institution's investigation into the Holy Curia's Fragment has been somewhat insignificant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All that's left is to track Sir Burnett's past, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: All that's left is to track Sir Burnett's past, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: All that's left is to track Sir Burnett's past, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Prydwen was determined to find information and failed, it would seem like a dead end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Prydwen was determined to find information and failed, it would seem like a dead end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Prydwen was determined to find information and failed, it would seem like a dead end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: While serving as the Deputy Commander for Camelot Division, Burnett was extremely prudent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: While serving as the Deputy Commander for Camelot Division, Burnett was extremely prudent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: While serving as the Deputy Commander for Camelot Division, Burnett was extremely prudent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If he concealed information from the Institution, he must have had a good reason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If he concealed information from the Institution, he must have had a good reason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If he concealed information from the Institution, he must have had a good reason.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like what my father, the previous chief of Prydwen, would say.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like what my father, the previous chief of Prydwen, would say.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like what my father, the previous chief of Prydwen, would say.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the Institution faces a challenge, the Voice always leaves a <color=#ffd34c>prophecy</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the Institution faces a challenge, the Voice always leaves a <color=#ffd34c>prophecy</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the Institution faces a challenge, the Voice always leaves a <color=#ffd34c>prophecy</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have laid out everything about the Institution's current situation. So, I ask you as the chief of Prydwen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have laid out everything about the Institution's current situation. So, I ask you as the chief of Prydwen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have laid out everything about the Institution's current situation. So, I ask you as the chief of Prydwen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Old Voice. What is the Holy Curia's Fragment and where is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Old Voice. What is the Holy Curia's Fragment and where is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Old Voice. What is the Holy Curia's Fragment and where is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A prophecy... I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A prophecy... I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A prophecy... I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To you, it may seem like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To you, it may seem like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To you, it may seem like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So far, I've been using a <color=#ffd34c>certain means</color> to know the calculated future.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So far, I've been using a <color=#ffd34c>certain means</color> to know the calculated future.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So far, I've been using a <color=#ffd34c>certain means</color> to know the calculated future.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That doesn't mean there weren't any variables. Rather, I overcame them with a lot of people's determination and hard work.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That doesn't mean there weren't any variables. Rather, I overcame them with a lot of people's determination and hard work.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That doesn't mean there weren't any variables. Rather, I overcame them with a lot of people's determination and hard work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a result... as you can see, mankind was able to win the game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a result... as you can see, mankind was able to win the game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a result... as you can see, mankind was able to win the game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even without the Qliphoth Game, there were countless branches for the destruction of the world to begin with.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even without the Qliphoth Game, there were countless branches for the destruction of the world to begin with.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even without the Qliphoth Game, there were countless branches for the destruction of the world to begin with.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But now, after the first game, I don't know what's beyond the ending.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But now, after the first game, I don't know what's beyond the ending.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But now, after the first game, I don't know what's beyond the ending.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must act extremely carefully, for I don't know the outcome of these branches.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must act extremely carefully, for I don't know the outcome of these branches.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must act extremely carefully, for I don't know the outcome of these branches.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That sounds like it is related to the world's Corruption rate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That sounds like it is related to the world's Corruption rate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That sounds like it is related to the world's Corruption rate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha, I see you catch on quick.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha, I see you catch on quick.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha, I see you catch on quick.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What I'm about to tell you isn't a prophecy, but more of some <color=#ffd34c>advice</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What I'm about to tell you isn't a prophecy, but more of some <color=#ffd34c>advice</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What I'm about to tell you isn't a prophecy, but more of some <color=#ffd34c>advice</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Find the <color=#ffd34c>Holy Grail</color>, Chief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Find the <color=#ffd34c>Holy Grail</color>, Chief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Find the <color=#ffd34c>Holy Grail</color>, Chief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you just say... the Holy Grail?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you just say... the Holy Grail?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you just say... the Holy Grail?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct. Find it and seal it away forever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct. Find it and seal it away forever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct. Find it and seal it away forever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is the only advice I can give you as Old Voice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is the only advice I can give you as Old Voice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is the only advice I can give you as Old Voice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So what will you do now, Supreme Administrator?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...So what will you do now, Supreme Administrator?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...So what will you do now, Supreme Administrator?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, even if that is the case, not much will change from what I was planning to do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, even if that is the case, not much will change from what I was planning to do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, even if that is the case, not much will change from what I was planning to do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: First, I'll have to resolve the problems we're facing now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: First, I'll have to resolve the problems we're facing now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: First, I'll have to resolve the problems we're facing now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: On that note, I would like to ask for another favor...
records.m_Talk_DEU: On that note, I would like to ask for another favor...
records.m_Talk_FRA: On that note, I would like to ask for another favor...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How shameless of you. What might this favour be?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How shameless of you. What might this favour be?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How shameless of you. What might this favour be?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you interested in the Gauntlet?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you interested in the Gauntlet?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you interested in the Gauntlet?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you recommend a talented individual to me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you recommend a talented individual to me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you recommend a talented individual to me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay then, everyone!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay then, everyone!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay then, everyone!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shall we hear what our new champions have to say about their win?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shall we hear what our new champions have to say about their win?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shall we hear what our new champions have to say about their win?

records.m_Talk_ENG: F959licette, how are you feeling right now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: F959licette, how are you feeling right now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: F959licette, how are you feeling right now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mitchie, did you just say "the new champion"?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mitchie, did you just say "the new champion"?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mitchie, did you just say "the new champion"?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then that means...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then that means...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then that means...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, c'mon, Little Captain. Why are you so bloody slow?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, c'mon, Little Captain. Why are you so bloody slow?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, c'mon, Little Captain. Why are you so bloody slow?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You won. We're the new champions now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You won. We're the new champions now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You won. We're the new champions now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was told that this was a simple escort mission, but things have snowballed more than I had expected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was told that this was a simple escort mission, but things have snowballed more than I had expected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was told that this was a simple escort mission, but things have snowballed more than I had expected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe I'll have to recalculate my fee for this one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe I'll have to recalculate my fee for this one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe I'll have to recalculate my fee for this one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah! V for victory! V!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah! V for victory! V!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah! V for victory! V!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We did it, F959licette! We really won!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We did it, F959licette! We really won!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We did it, F959licette! We really won!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm so happy that everyone got together and achieved this dream!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm so happy that everyone got together and achieved this dream!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm so happy that everyone got together and achieved this dream!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I dedicate this honor to our commander and my fellow Fenrir Squad members!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I dedicate this honor to our commander and my fellow Fenrir Squad members!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I dedicate this honor to our commander and my fellow Fenrir Squad members!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey. Little Captain was frowning during the entire league.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blimey. Little Captain was frowning during the entire league.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey. Little Captain was frowning during the entire league.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess they're right about smiles softening even the most ardent critics. She should have smiled like that long ago!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guess they're right about smiles softening even the most ardent critics. She should have smiled like that long ago!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess they're right about smiles softening even the most ardent critics. She should have smiled like that long ago!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, though it's none of my business anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, though it's none of my business anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, though it's none of my business anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay... Guess it's time for the extras to leave, eh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay... Guess it's time for the extras to leave, eh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay... Guess it's time for the extras to leave, eh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Going back already, Roy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Going back already, Roy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Going back already, Roy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Boss?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Boss?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Boss?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why don't you stay a bit longer? I was considering throwing a party to celebrate winning the league.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why don't you stay a bit longer? I was considering throwing a party to celebrate winning the league.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why don't you stay a bit longer? I was considering throwing a party to celebrate winning the league.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nah. Party or not, I'm not good with crowds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nah. Party or not, I'm not good with crowds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nah. Party or not, I'm not good with crowds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I like the distance I'm at right now. So Boss, pretend you didn't see me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I like the distance I'm at right now. So Boss, pretend you didn't see me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I like the distance I'm at right now. So Boss, pretend you didn't see me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha, all right. If that's what you want, I'll respect it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha, all right. If that's what you want, I'll respect it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha, all right. If that's what you want, I'll respect it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here, take this. It's your portion of the winnings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here, take this. It's your portion of the winnings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here, take this. It's your portion of the winnings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good job, Roy Burnett. I'm looking forward to what you'll do in the future.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good job, Roy Burnett. I'm looking forward to what you'll do in the future.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good job, Roy Burnett. I'm looking forward to what you'll do in the future.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Huh? But all the winnings should've gone to Tea Bo
8g I mean, my client, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Huh? But all the winnings should've gone to Tea Bo

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, we'll actually be seeing each other again soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Roy Burnett.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Roy Burnett.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Roy Burnett.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Smell of burning garbage, littered streets... and people drunk off their minds...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Smell of burning garbage, littered streets... and people drunk off their minds...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Smell of burning garbage, littered streets... and people drunk off their minds...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, it's been ages since my mum's funeral, but this place hasn't changed a bit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, it's been ages since my mum's funeral, but this place hasn't changed a bit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, it's been ages since my mum's funeral, but this place hasn't changed a bit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh.* I really didn't want to come back here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh.* I really didn't want to come back here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh.* I really didn't want to come back here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But since I'm already in Charade, I might as well visit my old man.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But since I'm already in Charade, I might as well visit my old man.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But since I'm already in Charade, I might as well visit my old man.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And... I have something to ask him too.

records.m_Talk_FRA: And... I have something to ask him too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oi, Dad! You home?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oi, Dad! You home?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oi, Dad! You home?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's me! Open the door! It's Roy!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's me! Open the door! It's Roy!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's me! Open the door! It's Roy!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? I came all this way for nothing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? I came all this way for nothing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? I came all this way for nothing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Roy? Did you just say you're Roy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Roy? Did you just say you're Roy?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Dad? Oi, you really Robert Burnett?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What's up with you? Why do you look so dead?

records.m_Talk_DEU: What brings you here? I thought you left for good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What brings you here? I thought you left for good.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Loud and clear, Elizabeth. Have you finished the investigation I asked about?

root.m_Talk_FRA: You proclaimed your identity with such pride, as if something were to change in the aftermath of the game.

root.m_Talk_FRA: But you're still merely requesting favours from behind the veil, Old Voice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mh?

root.m_Talk_FRA: No. I believe this is our first time meeting in person, Supreme Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Burnett and I were long friends.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Just like what my father, the previous chief of Prydwen, would say.

root.m_Talk_FRA: When the Institution faces a challenge, the Voice always leaves a <color=#ffd34c>prophecy</color>.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Old Voice. What is the Holy Curia's Fragment and where is it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A prophecy... I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then that means...

root.m_Talk_FRA: Then that means...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, c'mon, Little Captain. Why are you so bloody slow?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, c'mon, Little Captain. Why are you so bloody slow?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, c'mon, Little Captain. Why are you so bloody slow?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You won. We're the new champions now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You won. We're the new champions now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You won. We're the new champions now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was told that this was a simple escort mission, but things have snowballed more than I had expected.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was told that this was a simple escort mission, but things have snowballed more than I had expected.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was told that this was a simple escort mission, but things have snowballed more than I had expected.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I believe I'll have to recalculate my fee for this one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I believe I'll have to recalculate my fee for this one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I believe I'll have to recalculate my fee for this one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah! V for victory! V!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah! V for victory! V!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah! V for victory! V!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We did it, F959licette! We really won!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We did it, F959licette! We really won!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We did it, F959licette! We really won!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm so happy that everyone got together and achieved this dream!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm so happy that everyone got together and achieved this dream!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm so happy that everyone got together and achieved this dream!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I dedicate this honor to our commander and my fellow Fenrir Squad members!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I dedicate this honor to our commander and my fellow Fenrir Squad members!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I dedicate this honor to our commander and my fellow Fenrir Squad members!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Blimey. Little Captain was frowning during the entire league.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Blimey. Little Captain was frowning during the entire league.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Blimey. Little Captain was frowning during the entire league.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Guess they're right about smiles softening even the most ardent critics. She should have smiled like that long ago!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Guess they're right about smiles softening even the most ardent critics. She should have smiled like that long ago!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Guess they're right about smiles softening even the most ardent critics. She should have smiled like that long ago!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, though it's none of my business anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, though it's none of my business anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, though it's none of my business anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay... Guess it's time for the extras to leave, eh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay... Guess it's time for the extras to leave, eh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay... Guess it's time for the extras to leave, eh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Going back already, Roy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Going back already, Roy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Going back already, Roy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, Boss?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, Boss?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, Boss?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why don't you stay a bit longer? I was considering throwing a party to celebrate winning the league.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why don't you stay a bit longer? I was considering throwing a party to celebrate winning the league.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why don't you stay a bit longer? I was considering throwing a party to celebrate winning the league.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nah. Party or not, I'm not good with crowds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nah. Party or not, I'm not good with crowds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nah. Party or not, I'm not good with crowds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I like the distance I'm at right now. So Boss, pretend you didn't see me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I like the distance I'm at right now. So Boss, pretend you didn't see me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I like the distance I'm at right now. So Boss, pretend you didn't see me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha, all right. If that's what you want, I'll respect it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha, all right. If that's what you want, I'll respect it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha, all right. If that's what you want, I'll respect it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Here, take this. It's your portion of the winnings.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Here, take this. It's your portion of the winnings.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Here, take this. It's your portion of the winnings.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good job, Roy Burnett. I'm looking forward to what you'll do in the future.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good job, Roy Burnett. I'm looking forward to what you'll do in the future.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good job, Roy Burnett. I'm looking forward to what you'll do in the future.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Huh? But all the winnings should've gone to Tea Bo
8g I mean, my client, no?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Huh? But all the winnings should've gone to Tea Bo
8g I mean, my client, no?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Huh? But all the winnings should've gone to Tea Bo
8g I mean, my client, no?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha, don't worry. I already paid your client.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha, don't worry. I already paid your client.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha, don't worry. I already paid your client.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that money is all yours.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that money is all yours.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that money is all yours.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I even put in a little extra for your hospital fees.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I even put in a little extra for your hospital fees.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I even put in a little extra for your hospital fees.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Heheh, what's this? A bit of an occupational hazard compensation? Guess it's better than some other place I know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Heheh, what's this? A bit of an occupational hazard compensation? Guess it's better than some other place I know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Heheh, what's this? A bit of an occupational hazard compensation? Guess it's better than some other place I know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, Boss.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, Boss.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, Boss.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This one was a subcontract of a subcontract, but call me directly next time, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This one was a subcontract of a subcontract, but call me directly next time, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This one was a subcontract of a subcontract, but call me directly next time, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, we'll actually be seeing each other again soon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, we'll actually be seeing each other again soon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, we'll actually be seeing each other again soon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Roy Burnett.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Roy Burnett.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Roy Burnett.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Smell of burning garbage, littered streets... and people drunk off their minds...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Smell of burning garbage, littered streets... and people drunk off their minds...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Smell of burning garbage, littered streets... and people drunk off their minds...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, it's been ages since my mum's funeral, but this place hasn't changed a bit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, it's been ages since my mum's funeral, but this place hasn't changed a bit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, it's been ages since my mum's funeral, but this place hasn't changed a bit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh.* I really didn't want to come back here...
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh.* I really didn't want to come back here...
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh.* I really didn't want to come back here...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But since I'm already in Charade, I might as well visit my old man.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But since I'm already in Charade, I might as well visit my old man.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But since I'm already in Charade, I might as well visit my old man.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And... I have something to ask him too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And... I have something to ask him too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And... I have something to ask him too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oi, Dad! You home?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oi, Dad! You home?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oi, Dad! You home?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's me! Open the door! It's Roy!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's me! Open the door! It's Roy!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's me! Open the door! It's Roy!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? I came all this way for nothing?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? I came all this way for nothing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever. If I can't, I won't...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
